input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Check Feb 15 headlines
fname = 'articles/2026/02/15/articles.jsonl'
kws = ['india pakistan', 'pakistan india', 't20', 'cricket', 'ice hockey', 'winter olym', 'medal', 'storm', 'rousey', 'benfica', 'bangladesh', 'state of union', 'democratic response', 'iran', 'ukraine', 'doge', 'chelsea']
with open(fname) as f:
    for line in f:
        art = json.loads(line)
        title = (art.get('title','') or '').lower()
        for kw in kws:
            if kw in title:
                print(f'[{kw}] {(art.get(\"title\",\"\") or \"\")[:120]}')
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -40
